label: TTPLA · 04_2220 (held-out)
notes: TTPLA validation image (Abdelfattah et al., 2020 · Apache 2.0). Held out from training under the seed-42 random split — i.e. the model never saw this image during fitting. Use this to gauge in-domain segmentation quality.

label: TTPLA · 07_1875 (held-out)
notes: TTPLA validation image (seed-42 random split). A second held-out scene; useful for spotting per-image variance in the predicted mask.

label: TTPLA · 14_00074 (cross-session held-out)
notes: TTPLA validation image from a different capture session (prefix 14). Held out under both the seed-42 random split AND the session-grouped split — i.e. cross-flight evaluation. Lighting and background distribution differ from sessions in training, exposing genuine generalisation.

label: Synthetic LV · parallel street run
notes: Procedural urban-LV scene: a four-span feeder running parallel to a street. Out-of-domain — the model is trained on rural transmission lines, so partial recovery is expected and informative.

label: Synthetic LV · transformer star
notes: Four catenary cables radiating from a central transformer pole. Demonstrates the visual target the wider project would address; the model is not trained for this domain, so partial recovery is expected.

label: Synthetic LV · long feeder with drops
notes: A multi-span feeder with three building drops. Built to expose the gap between TTPLA's transmission-line training distribution and urban LV imagery.
